description_long: This is a standard Coca-Cola can, featuring a cylindrical aluminum body with a slightly tapered top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo wrapping around its surface, accompanied by dynamic white and yellow swoosh graphics. Small water droplets are visible on the exterior, suggesting condensation and a cold beverage inside. The top of the can is metallic gray with a pull-tab opening mechanism, typical of soft drink cans. Nutritional information, barcodes, and branding details are printed on the back in white text. The can's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and emphasizing its metallic construction.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding, metallic top, and condensation droplets, featuring detailed logos and nutritional information.
description_view_0: The can's front is visible, showcasing the large white Coca-Cola script logo and part of the barcode and nutritional information on the left.
description_view_1: This view highlights the side of the can, with the swoosh graphics and a partial view of the Coca-Cola logo, emphasizing the can's curvature and condensation.
description_view_2: The can is rotated to show more of the swoosh design and the edge of the Coca-Cola logo, with less visible text and more focus on the red and white graphics.
description_view_3: The back of the can is shown, displaying the Coca-Cola logo at the top, detailed nutritional information, barcode, and other product details.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white Coca-Cola script logo wraps around the can, with additional white text for nutritional information, barcode, and product details on the back. The branding is bold and highly visible against the red background, with yellow and white swoosh graphics accenting the design.
